name: trade_press_batch_v4_30_candidate_audit_v1
scope: Union of artifact-level candidates surfaced by openai/gpt-4o-mini and groq/openai-gpt-oss-20b

items.title: Schneider Electric to invest $700M in US manufacturing
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Direct manufacturing investment with explicit spend and facility activity.

items.title: Rolls-Royce invests $75M in South Carolina engine plant
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Explicit plant investment and physical expansion.

items.title: Rockwell Automation confirms Wisconsin factory location, part of $2B US expansion
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Explicit factory siting and multi-year expansion spend.

items.title: Mitsubishi Electric subsidiary invests $86M in switchgear factory
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Direct factory investment into grid equipment manufacturing.

items.title: Roche to expand, open Indianapolis and North Carolina sites
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Multi-site physical expansion is direct capital deployment.

items.title: Rowan Digital breaks ground on 300MW data center campus outside San Antonio, Texas
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Groundbreaking for a large data center campus is direct buildout.

items.title: CyrusOne breaks ground on Fort Worth data center campus in Texas
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Direct campus construction.

items.title: EdgeCore expands Mesa data center campus in Arizona
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Explicit campus expansion.

items.title: EdgeCore begins construction at 114MW Northern Virginia campus
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Direct construction commencement.

items.title: Rowan secures $500m for 300MW Texas data center project
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Project financing for a specific data center buildout.

items.title: Schneider Electric to invest $700M in US manufacturing
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Same valid capital-deployment signal surfaced from a second artifact.

items.title: Hitachi unveils $1B grid manufacturing investment, including Virginia transformer factory
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Direct manufacturing investment with named factory expansion.

items.title: Power enclosure maker AVL to establish its first US plant
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: New plant establishment is real physical buildout even without explicit spend in the headline.

items.title: Hyundai boosts US investments to $26B through 2028
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Large capital allocation is real, but the headline is broad and not tightly tied to one rising-demand industrial system.

items.title: PG&E data center pipeline swells to 10GW
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Strong demand signal, but pipeline size is not yet direct committed buildout or spend.

items.title: US utility Exelon reports data center pipeline of 33GW
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Useful directional demand signal, but still pipeline language rather than committed capital.

items.title: First Energy data center pipeline surges to 2.6GW by 2029
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Good signal for demand pressure; not yet direct project authorization or spend.

items.title: PPL Electric's data center pipeline soars to 14GW
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Pipeline signal is relevant but should remain review-stage by default.

items.title: DTE inks first data center deal to grow electric load 25%
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: First deal plus explicit load growth is concrete demand pull with likely utility capex implications.

items.title: Exelon data center pipeline jumps to 17 GW as load forecast turns positive
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Forecast and pipeline signal matter, but this still sits one step upstream of direct buildout.

items.title: FirstEnergy’s 5-year data center pipeline doubles to 3 GW
items.label: borderline_should_review
items.reason: Pipeline expansion is informative, but not yet a direct capital-flow artifact.

items.title: Italy-based Westrafo to build its first US transformer plant
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: New transformer plant is direct manufacturing buildout.

items.title: GE Vernova to invest nearly $600M in US factories
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Explicit factory investment and manufacturing expansion.

items.title: Jabil picks North Carolina for $500M AI facility
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Specific facility siting and spend indicate direct capital allocation.

items.title: Hitachi Energy commits $250M to address transformer shortage
items.label: correct_candidate
items.reason: Explicit spend to relieve an industrial shortage fits rising-demand structural pressure.
